SELECT arrayJoin(range(1, 3)) AS r, num FROM test_range;
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT range(5) AS r) AS subquery;
SELECT a.num, b.range_output FROM (SELECT num FROM test_range) AS a, (SELECT range(0, 10) AS range_output) AS b WHERE a.num < 5;
WITH range(1, 10, 2) AS r SELECT arrayJoin(r) AS val;
WITH range(0, 255) AS r1, range(1, 5, 2) AS r2 SELECT arrayJoin(r1) + arrayJoin(r2) AS summed_values;
SELECT range(5) UNION ALL SELECT range(10, 15);
SELECT arrayJoin(range(1, 11)) AS r, IF(r % 2 = 0, 'Even', 'Odd') AS r_type FROM (SELECT range(1, 11));
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(range(10, 0, -1)) AS r) WHERE r > 5;
